texto: Briefly, in the act of composition, as an instrument there intervenes and is most potent, fire, flaming, fervid, hot; but in the very substance of the compound there intervenes, as an ingredient, as it is commonly called, as a material principle and as a constituent of the whole compound the material and principle of fire, not fire itself. This I was the first to call phlogiston.
explicacao: Citação de Georg Ernst Stahl sobre temas ligados a autoestima. “Briefly, in the act of composition, as an instrument there intervenes and is most potent, fire, f…” articula autoestima, chemistry, fire em registro de autoestima, com relevância para contextos como fire e instrument.

frase_original: Briefly, in the act of composition, as an instrument there intervenes and is most potent, fire, flaming, fervid, hot; but in the very substance of the compound there intervenes, as an ingredient, as it is commonly called, as a material principle and as a constituent of the whole compound the material and principle of fire, not fire itself. This I was the first to call phlogiston.
